content: Donald Trump has threatened to 'obliterate' Iran’s power plants if Tehran fails to open the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Casualties as Israeli settlers set fire to homes and cars in West Bank

title: 'If Liverpool play like that at PSG it could be 10-0'
